title: Tangy Crumbly Algerian Lettuce Cumber
description: A kid-friendly Algerian dish featuring little gem lettuce crumbled with toasted almond slices and a tangy lemon dressing, perfect as a light lunch or snack.
instructions: Toast almonds in a dry skillet over medium heat for about 2-3 minutes or until lightly golden.
Wash and dry the lettuce. Remove outer leaves, leaving only the tender inner parts.
Chop the lettuce into bite-sized pieces and place them on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Sprinkle toasted almonds evenly over the top of the lettuce.
In a small bowl, whisk together lemon zest, Dijon mustard, apple cider vinegar, olive oil, salt, and pepper. Pour dressing over the lettuce and almonds mixture.
Toss gently to coat all ingredients evenly with the dressing.
Bake for 10-12 minutes or until edges of lettuce are slightly crisp but not browned.
Serve warm as a snack or side dish.
